rules.name: German Legal Organisation AG

rules.description: Extracts organisation names that appear immediately after 'Partei' (e.g., 'beklagte Partei Name').

rules.name: German Legal Organisation AG
rules.description: Matches Aktiengesellschaft entities, excluding 'Partei' suffix.

rules.name: German Legal Organisation GmbH
rules.description: Matches standard GmbH entities, excluding 'Partei' suffix to avoid false positives on party names.

rules.name: German Court Organisation
rules.description: Matches court names which are also organisations.
rules.content: \b(?:Bezirksgericht|Landesgericht|Oberlandesgericht|Oberster Gerichtshof|Arbeits- und Sozialgericht|Verwaltungsgerichtshof|Verfassungsgerichtshof) \w+(?: \w+)?(?: Wien|Graz|Linz|Innsbruck|Salzburg|Klagenfurt|Bregenz|Eisenstadt|St. Pölten)?(?: als Berufungsgericht|als Rekursgericht)?

rules.name: German Legal Organisation Specific Entities List
rules.description: Matches specific known entities from training data to ensure high precision for rare names. Added missing entities like 'Buth Analyse GmbH', 'Inn Synmon GmbH', 'Donau Wilverlog', 'KRV Technik', 'Beratung Valtal GmbH', 'Nexberkraft AG', 'Werkber-Garten AG', 'Klüs Event AG'.
rules.content: \b(Buth Analyse GmbH|Inn Synmon GmbH|Donau Wilverlog|KRV Technik|Beratung Valtal GmbH|Nexberkraft AG|Werkber-Garten AG|Klüs Event AG|Tal Kelfurtzor Betriebe GmbH|Hamrosi Garten AG|SKSP Immobilien GmbH|Scherg und Kintzli Holz GmbH|Wagenlöhner Versand GmbH|SKRV IT Vertrieb|Medien Gartheim|WestGarten|Norglanz|Gruetze Handel Limited|RheinLogistik GmbH|Maschinenbau Waldtra GmbH|Bersud-Technik GmbH|JUPL Sicherheit GmbH|Mur Dorfheim GmbH)\b

rules.name: German Legal Organisation Partial Name with Context Dr/Mag
rules.description: Extracts organisation names followed by titles like Dr. or Mag. STRICTLY requires the name to contain a space or hyphen to avoid matching single-word personal names (e.g., 'Dr. Uwe Jamal').
